playbook.intent: Open bug tracker + sprawling debt list → grouped, severity-tagged, top-3 resolved or queued.
playbook.scope: 60-minute Friday ritual: Sentry / GitHub issues grouped, severity-tagged, top-3 fixed or queued, debt list updated with one decision per item (fix now / accept / kill). Exit artifact is clean tracker view + updated debt log.

success-criteria.criterion: All open issues have severity tag
Top 3 issues either fixed or scheduled with owner
Debt log: every item has decision (fix-now / accept / kill)

stage.name: Group
stage.intent: Cluster bugs by theme; surface duplicates.
stage.decision-gate: Advance when every issue has theme + severity. Refuse to skip — solo founders accumulate noise fast.

stage.name: Decide
stage.intent: One decision per item: fix now, accept, or kill.

tasks.task: Score top items against impact + effort

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every top-10 item has a decision. No 'maybe later'.

stage.name: Ship
stage.intent: Fix the top-3 chosen items inside the hour.

tasks.task: Ship with feature flag if risky

stage.decision-gate: Required output: 3 PRs merged. Defer remainder to next week's bash.

extra.value: ['Major refactors — debt items get queued, not executed', Customer-facing comms — separate inbox-sweep playbook]
['Issue tracker exists (GitHub, Linear, or similar)', Sentry/logging in place (monitoring-logging complete)]
[Trying to fix all of them — guarantees nothing ships, Leaving items without decision — they rot in the backlog]
['Did every item I touched get a decision, or did I leave some ''open''?', 'Are the 3 I fixed actually high-impact, or just easy?']
{human: faion get-content friday-bug-bash-triage --format md, agent: faion get-content friday-bug-bash-triage --format context, json: faion get-content friday-bug-bash-triage --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P1 solo SaaS builder persona}]
